sentences.arabic: حِينَ يَحْزَنُ الإِنْسَانُ يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى شَخْصٍ يَجْلِسُ مَعَهُ.
sentences.translation: Kada je čovjek tužan, treba mu neko ko će sjediti s njim.
sentences.translationEn: When a person is sad they need someone to sit with them.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَحْتَاجُ دَائِمًا إِلَى كَلَامٍ بَلْ إِلَى حُضُورٍ.
sentences.translation: Ne treba mu uvijek razgovor nego prisustvo.
sentences.translationEn: They do not always need words but rather a presence.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتْ جُمَانَةُ بِجَانِبِ صَدِيقَتِهَا الْحَزِينَةِ بِصَمْتٍ.
sentences.translation: Džumana je tiho sjela pored svoje tužne prijateljice.
sentences.translationEn: Jumana sat beside her sad friend in silence.

sentences.translation: Prijateljica je osjetila da nije sama.
sentences.translationEn: The friend felt that she was not alone.
